review_title: A great option for monitoring performance in LLMs
author: David W.
pros: Accuranker has allowed us to get an understanding of our presence in LLMs. Unlike other tools we looked at it includes multiple LLMs as standard. The suggested prompts are useful and being able to see which publications the LLMs are using to make their recommendations has given us a clear idea of which publications we should be targeting from a PR point of view.
cons: The only downside is the price - the tool isn't cheap but it works well and there are continuous improvements being made.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A valuable tool for organic traffic optimization.
description: Quick an easy overview of my search performance.
author: Lasse J.
pros: I like that it is focused on keyword tracking without spreading its toolkit too thin with related features
cons: A keyword on mobile and desktop are counted as two keywords, adding clutter and eating up the allowed quota

review_title: Accurate and fast ranker!
description: We needed a a good seo ranker for our clients. And since each of them has between 10 and 100 main keywords, we knew we were looking for both quantity and quality. We were very pleasantly surprised by AccuRanker: it does what it says on the package. And the kicker? It not only shows Google data, but also Yandex, Baidu, Bing and YouTube. Since our clients are all over the world, this fit the bill nicely.
author: Sorin A.
pros: SEO is changing day by day. Without a good ranker, it's hard to know how you or your clients are doing. AccuRanker is not your run of the mill service in this category. It understand its users and provides things like: - unlimited users - great for an agency where there are multiple people checking ranks - share of voice - not just see how much traffic you're getting, but percent out of the total available - google data studio integration - this was a major win for us, as we use GDS for all our clients Frankly, there are too many good things to mention about AccuRanker. It's a solit partner for us.
cons: The interface is something that could be improved. Or rather rebuilt from the ground up. It sometimes feels childish, other times it feels like a generic dashboard time. Buttons feels squishy and there's no overall weight to your actions within the app - it's something we've learned to get used to and live with.

review_title: Most userfriendly and intuitive ranktracker on the internet
description: When Accuranker launched on Appsumo, I jumped in. I have now been using it for probably 6 years, and I just love it. I use it every day. I work in SEO, Im obsessed with checking rankings, and Accuranker solves this task to perfection.
author: Jesper N.
pros: The top feature about Accuranker is the overview I get of all my campaigns, and the fact that I can click on individual keywords, and see the rank history. I also love that I can compare my current status to older rank status, so I can compare current ranks with, for example, the ranks a month ago.
cons: Accuranker recently made a major update to their backend user interface. I understand that this happens sometimes, I just happen to like the old userface more :-) Its not really a critique per se, just my preference..

review_title: Very well made software for accurate tracking of SERP positions with some very unique functions
description: Excellent and very well made software for accurate tracking of serp positions, and with latest updates this sofware has become vital for my SEO work, since it hase very unique feature - Keyword Discovery.
author: Matjaž M.
pros: + very accurate results and huge database for "organic site explorer" and "keyword discovery" function ... i do own some other tools for SERP tracking, but none is so accurate+ "keyword discovery" function that will show you you're already ranking keywords that you did not even know ... + "organic site explorer" : this function will put your ranking in another perspective ... it will show your SERP competitors AND it will show for what keywords they rank + GUI in general: quick and responsive+ it has AI that will correctly tag your youre keywords into commercial, transaction and navigational - based on intention
cons: - quick filter for keywords should be better ( simple ajax would do so that filtering would when you start typing in )- not possible to batch edit descriptions for kw- not possible to show tag column in main keyword table-not possible to show only mobile or only desktop keywords in main table

review_title: Tracks My Keywords Every Day to Catch Issues Early
description: I am happy with... it's definitely better than me having to check keywords ranking manually.
author: Doug L.
pros: It checks my keyword rankings daily, unlike other tools that can take up to a week between updates.
cons: I really wish it had an integrated AI Copilot feature that that I could query for suggestions as I use the Accuranker tool.

review_title: A Slick SEO Tool for Fast, Accurate Tracking (by Mark Heninger, Slick.ID)
description: For those who prioritize speed, accuracy, and user-friendliness in their rank-tracking tool, AccuRanker is a fantastic choice. The on-demand updates, hyper-local tracking, and additional features like Share of Voice and Google Grump make it a compelling tool, especially for local SEO specialists.
author: mark H.
pros: As someone who works in the trenches of local SEO daily at Slick.ID (your one-stop shop for a powerful online presence!), accurate and timely rank tracking is crucial. That's why I was excited to delve into AccuRanker (https://www.accuranker.com/pricing/) and see what it offers. Here's my take: AccuRanker Shines in Speed and Location: Lightning-Fast Updates: Forget waiting for scheduled checks. AccuRanker lets you see ranking changes as they happen. This is a game-changer for staying ahead of the curve in volatile SERPs. Local SEOs like me need to be nimble, and AccuRanker delivers the agility we crave. Hyper-Local Precision: AccuRanker goes beyond the city or state. With zip code and even neighborhood tracking, you get a crystal-clear picture of how your local business is ranking. This hyper-focusing is essential for dominating your local market, which is exactly what Slick.ID helps our clients achieve. A User-Friendly Interface Makes Life Easier: Clear and Simple: Gone are the days of wrestling with complex dashboards. AccuRanker's interface is a breath of fresh air. It's intuitive and easy to navigate, even for those new to SEO. This saves valuable time for busy professionals like myself, allowing us to focus on what matters most: growing our clients' online presence. Customizable Reporting: Want to share insights with clients or team members? AccuRanker's customizable reporting lets you tailor data to showcase the most relevant metrics. Imagine presenting a report to a local business owner, highlighting their ranking dominance in their neighborhood – that's the power of Slick-looking reports from AccuRanker! Going Beyond the Basics: Share of Voice: AccuRanker delves deeper than just your own rankings. See how much visibility your brand has compared to competitors on the SERP with "Share of Voice" metrics. Knowing your competitive landscape empowers you to develop winning SEO strategies – a key element of the Slick.ID approach to online domination. The Google Grump Whisperer? Based on recent Google algorithm updates, this unique feature uses historical data to predict potential ranking volatility. While not a crystal ball, it provides a valuable heads-up for potential fluctuations – like a friendly nudge from the "Google Grump" himself! Slick Integrations: AccuRanker plays nicely with other SEO tools like Google Analytics and Search Console. This allows for a holistic view of your SEO performance, consolidating data into one place for ultimate efficiency. (Think of it as the seamless integration Slick.ID offers between your website, social media, and digital information!)
cons: AccuRanker excels in rank tracking, but if you need a broader SEO suite with features like backlink analysis or comprehensive keyword research, you might want to explore options like Ahrefs or Semrush.

review_title: Accurank tracker user
description: Very good. It tracks keywords accurately and easily shows me an overview of how my websites are doing.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The dashboard where i can see all the websites and keywords im tracking
cons: Nothing but if i had to choose something, the fact that each keyword for mobile and desktop search counts as 1 keyword each.

review_title: My favorite rank tracking tool
description: I have been using AccuRanker for more than 2 years to track my websites and is my favorite software to track. The best thing compared to others is that the software is regularly improved and new features are added.
author: Metka S.
pros: It is very easy to use and gives you a lot of information about you website and how to improve it even more.
cons: Nothing. I like it a lot and use it regularly.

review_title: Accurate Track Dashboard
description: It provides extensive rank tracking capabilities and serves as cloud based SEO performance hub
author: Jonah F.
pros: This service shines with real time position updates, custom alert workflows and in depth competitor benchmrking
cons: It misses some advanced report customisation so you dont get to white label dashboards fully for clients

review_title: One of the best tools for SEO and Keyword research
description: As a new agency owner, I find this tool really helpful to fulfil the SEO ranking requirements. The keyword research tool is definitely one of the best available tools in the market and at an affordable pricing. It is also quite easy to get started. I find the results to be accurate and would highly recommend to anyone.
author: Mahesh V.
pros: Competitor analysis, Keyword research and Site exploring features stand out for us.
cons: Pricing could have been better or would like to get more keywords for the price.

review_title: Best rank tracker
author: Michael C.
pros: Ease of use. It's automation and comparison charts.
cons: 1 ranking needs to take up two "credits" when measuring for both desktop and mobile.

review_title: The most reliable keyword rank tracking tool
description: AccuRanker helps me track, monitor, and report keyword positions.I can accurately track keyword ranks and other SEO analytics and report to clients using the platform. I prefer AccuRanker's data visualizations and daily keyword updates over other keyword research tools' keyword trackers. The keyword discovery option helps me locate fresh SEO prospects. By finding new terms my website ranks for, I may uncover content enhancement opportunities and optimize my pages for those keywords. I also use the Aggregated SERP Analysis tool, which shows your website's SERP characteristics and keyword dominance.The share of voice measure is a great way to show clients how their website compares to competitors. It helps me track my SEO efforts and delivers great insights and stats, making it a vital tool for any SEO strategy.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: After two years of using AccuRanker, its strongest feature is its fast and accurate ranking information. Tracking keyword ranks and SEO analytics is easy with the intuitive UI.Keyword discovery helps find fresh SEO opportunities for a website. The share of voice metric is incredibly useful for comparing a client's website to competitors. The tool's outstanding filter selection helps discover keywords rapidly. AccuRanker helps me track my website's search engine ranks, find keyword prospects, and monitor my competition. SEO and inbound marketers should use AccuRanker to track keyword ranks and other SEO KPIs.
cons: While using AccuRanker, I have not found any big concerns or dislikes. It is simple to use and gives accurate and fast rating information, making my everyday work much easier.

review_title: AccuRanker - Highly Recommended
description: My overall experience is positive. As with any business, the opportunity to save time and money is one that most will not and should not pass up. The information I receive is critical to my company's success and I will continue to use AccuRanker. I receive all the information I need through one program, and I cannot ask for anything more.
author: Michelle M.
pros: The largest benefit for using AccuRanker is accurate keyword ranking information. In addition, receiving information from Google Analytics and Search Console (and other programs) is an added benefit that saves a lot of time. I receive detailed competitor information, keyword information such as search trends, share of voice and search intent keyword classifications. The detailed keyword information such as winners and losers, traffic value, discovered keywords as well as average rank and CTR is critical information that is easily accessible on one dashboard.
cons: I don't believe there are any cons to using AccuRanker. The information provided is everything needed to manage optimizing websites for search intent. I receive a lot of information regarding each keyword as well as discovered keywords.

review_title: AccuRanker Combines Performance, Value and Ease of Use
description: We use AccuRanker to get immediate keyword rankings and competition analysis. It also helps us visualise the SEO journey and set client expectations. We've been using AccuRanker for 4+ years and it is an integral part of our service.
author: Ajay W.
pros: Every SEO project starts with AccuRanker. It gives us the quickest and most accurate results for keyword rankings. Our team enjoys its ease of use. Our clients appreciate its integrations with other software.
cons: I would like more integrations with 3rd-party reporting tools like Oviond. AccuRanker is immensely helpful when explaining SEO progress to clients and we need to be able to share it on multiple platforms.

review_title: Accuranker - one of most accurate ranking tools
description: I can spot keyword canibalisation. That is golden. Recently Google moved from ranking keywords to topics. That caused issue with canibalisation. Accuranker helps me detect these issues.
author: Klemen V.
pros: I trust Accuranker rank tracking.It allows me to distinguish effect of my actions to Google updates. E.g. by comparing my ranking fluctuations to the competition.I can see overall picture for entire domain, winners and loosers. It allows me to quickly spots all issues.
cons: It is a bit pricey, but it delivers good service.

review_title: Never found a SEO tool as pleasant to use on a daily basis
description: AccuRanker helps me staying focus on what matters and keeping a global view on what matters the most from a marketing and business point of view.
author: Laurent M.
pros: The product is very easy to use, not cluttered at all. Congratulations and keep up the good work. Please keep it that way.
cons: What I liked the least is that when you add or delete keywords the share of voice changes a lot, but if I'm correct you have no way to mark directly inside the tool that the changes of share of voice are related to that.

review_title: My Go-To Tool for Tracking Search Engine Rankings
description: AccuRanker is a valuable tool for staying informed about my keyword positions and how my content compares to the competition. The ability to view historical data is particularly useful for gaining insights into how Google's algorithms work, which is essential for successful SEO. With AccuRanker, I am able to monitor my progress and continually improve my search engine rankings.
author: Kolia B.
pros: I find the best thing is that I can always see all my most important rankings at a glance.
cons: There is nothing in particular that I don't like. It is important to know that AccuRanker is not a complete SEO tool kit. The focus is clearly on rank tracking.

review_title: Great software
description: AccuRanker is a great tool for monitoring the position of a website in Google results. As one of the few tools with each key phrase, it shows its search potential, thanks to which we can see how valuable the keyword is.
author: Sławomir G.
pros: Transparent panel, easy in everyday use.
cons: There's nothing I don't like here. This software is great. Maybe with higher fee plans.

review_title: AccuRanker review
description: Generally very good. It's my go to rank tracker.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It does what it promises and does it well. And you get all the data you need, without getting overwhelmed. Very good layout imo.
cons: The tiger kinda annoys me a bit, but I get the use for it.

review_title: Best Google position analysis tool
author: Krzysztof W.
pros: What I like most is the simplicity of use and the readability of the data presented. Many additional metrics make it much easier to analyze what's happening in Google's organic results.
cons: We use the tool to analyze positions in Google. In this field it works perfectly. There are a few features we don't use, but it's hard for me to point out something I would call a poor feature.

review_title: Fantastic Rank Tracking Software!
description: Exscellent. I love it and use it in conjunction with other more granular SEO tools
author: Michael K.
pros: I have been using this for well over a year now, and absolutely love how it has come along. While I also have other software for my SEO, Accuranker really helps by tracking both Google and Bing, and by having a phenomenal interface that is excellent for a quick view into how my tracked keyword are doing.It also has a great at a glance competitor tracking view, SERP analysis, keyword discovery and much more. As I mentioned, I also use one of the big SEO options out there, and one might think that it is enough. But this actually gives me much better information for quick decision making. It is a truly amazing tool, and I am really excited to see how it continues to grow.
cons: I would like to see it have an app and the ability for keyword alerts.

review_title: Amazing rank tracking and more
author: Tihomir T.
pros: I never found a tool good as Accuranker for tracking you kw position on google. The rankigs are very precise and it gives you a lot of valuable information, that other tools does not provide.You have also the competitors analysis that is really great and the kw discovery.
cons: I needed a rank tracker and Accuranker did not disappoints. Maybe I can say that it's pretty expensive, yet is an amazing prfoessional tool.

review_title: Great tool for keyword inspiration and tracking
author: Uwe D.
pros: The setup is one of the simplest of any SEO tool. Rather than having to manually input keyword data, a simple connection with Webmaster Console is enough to gain access to the already working keywords. Then the tool offers more options to add new keywords that you might want to track. Filtering options are great to focus on certain keywords (by volume, rank, etc.)
cons: Can't think of anything. It does what it's supposed to do :)

review_title: A great keyword tracker with a well designed dashboard
author: Tor S.
pros: AccuRanker allows us to track our keyword positions against our competitors in a fast and well-designed dashboard. It's blazing fast and very intuitive.
cons: We have had no problems with the use or integration of this product. It delivers.
